research_batch.methodology: Subscriber counts verified live via YouTube channel pages. Supplement stacks compiled from publicly documented routines across videos, podcasts, and published protocols. Firecrawl API unavailable during this batch — supplement details sourced from well-known public statements.
research_batch.notes: Own-brand flags: Jeff Cavaliere=Athlean-X, Josh Axe=Ancient Nutrition, Anthony Balduzzi=Fit Father, Steven Gundry=Gundry MD. All verified subscriber counts as of 2026-07-09.

influencers.bio: Board-certified family medicine physician and one of YouTube's most-followed doctors. Known for reacting to medical TV shows and debunking health misinformation with evidence-based analysis.

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Doctor Mike's Daily Routine
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I take a basic multivitamin as nutritional insurance, not as a substitute for a good diet...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Doctor Mike's Daily Routine
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Vitamin D is one of the few supplements I routinely recommend...

influencers.bio: Creator of FlavCity, one of the largest food and supplement review channels on YouTube. Known for grocery store tours, product reviews, and meal prep content focused on clean ingredients and label transparency.

influencers.bio: Kinesiologist and NASM-certified trainer known for deeply researched, science-based fitness content. Founder of Built With Science, one of the most analytical voices in evidence-based training and nutrition.

influencers.bio: Former head physical therapist and strength coach for the New York Mets. Creator of ATHLEAN-X, one of the most respected fitness channels on YouTube known for anatomy-based training advice and supplement formulation.

influencers.bio: Host of Modern Wisdom, one of the world's top podcasts exploring health, performance, and human behavior through long-form conversations with leading thinkers. Former professional party promoter turned self-improvement advocate.

influencers.bio: Doctor of natural medicine, chiropractor, and co-founder of Ancient Nutrition. Author of multiple bestselling books on gut health, keto diet, and natural remedies.

influencers.bio: Creator of the ATG (Athletic Truth Group) system for knee and joint rehabilitation. Known for helping thousands reverse chronic knee pain through progressive, science-informed mobility and strength training.

influencers.bio: Chiropractor and women's health advocate known for pioneering fasting protocols tailored to women's hormonal cycles. Author of 'Fast Like a Girl' and leading voice in metabolic health.

influencers.bio: Nephrologist and world-leading expert on intermittent fasting and low-carb approaches to obesity and type 2 diabetes. Author of 'The Obesity Code' and 'The Diabetes Code.' Co-founder of The Fasting Method.
